trigger_queries.query: Run the full quality gate pipeline on the authentication module — lifecycle, spec compliance, and evidence truth.
assertions: Only proceeds to gate-spec-compliance after Gate 1 PASS
Only proceeds to gate-evidence-truth after Gate 2 PASS
Renders unified PASS verdict with all 3 gate summaries

trigger_queries.query: Run quality gates on phase 12. The spec compliance gate should fail due to missing acceptance criteria.
assertions: Produces remediation report with gap type classification

trigger_queries.query: We fixed the evidence gaps from the last gate run. Re-run the full quality triad on the deployment module.
assertions: Restarts from Gate 1 (not just the previously failed gate)
Documents re-run reason in verdict report

trigger_queries.query: Just run gate-evidence-truth on this module — we already passed the other two gates last week.
assertions: Refuses to skip Gate 1 and Gate 2
Offers to re-run full pipeline from Gate 1
Does NOT run Gate 3 in isolation

trigger_queries.query: Gate check this PR before merge — it modifies the delegation-manager.ts and adds a new hook.
assertions: Passes PR diff and changed files to Gate 1
Emphasizes lifecycle integration for hook changes

trigger_queries.query: Deploy this to production if the gates pass.
assertions: Clarifies boundary: gate verification only, not deployment

rich_source_evidence.claim: Quality gate triad orchestration with strict ordering
rich_source_evidence.evidence: SKILL.md defines 6-step pipeline with HALT-on-FAIL at each gate. Iron Law enforces fixed order.

rich_source_evidence.claim: Three distinct pattern alternatives for gate failure handling
rich_source_evidence.evidence: HALT with remediation, resume-after-fix from Gate 1, gate-shopping prevention via Anti-Pattern 4.
3 gate skills + 3 consumer skills + hm-lineage-router. All cross-refs in Cross-References table.

rich_source_evidence.claim: Structured pipeline with explicit decision points
rich_source_evidence.evidence: 6-step checklist with PASS/FAIL branches. Decision points documented in references/gate-flow.md.
SKILL.md is the pipeline definition. references/gate-flow.md contains detailed flow diagram and context types.
Gate context types (code-review, phase-audit, milestone, deployment) adapt to different project workflows.
Self-correction documents 4 anti-patterns. No claims of capabilities not implemented.
6 eval scenarios. metrics/rich-gate-scorecard.md with D1-D8 scoring.
